items.text: At turn start, take damage equal to the stack count, then halve the stacks. This damage ignores Shield and is not affected by Vulnerable.
Whenever an item triggers, this target takes extra damage equal to the stack count. This damage is not affected by Vulnerable. Cleared at turn end.
When this arrow triggers an item, apply 1 Arc to a random enemy.
Disappears at turn end or when leaving your hand, and does not return to the draw pile.
When this arrow triggers an item, apply 1 random Weak, Slow, or Vulnerable to a random enemy and draw 1 extra arrow into the play area.
Each stack increases damage taken by 1. Lose 1 stack after taking damage.
Each stack reduces defense by 1. Stacks are halved at turn end.
Each stack reduces attack by 1. Stacks are halved at turn end.
When this arrow triggers an item, gain 1 Shield.
Reflect damage blocked by Shield. Cleared at turn end.
Draw extra cards equal to the stack count, then clear this after drawing.
After next turn starts, gain extra redraw chances equal to the stack count.
Spell Power X: damage dealt +X. Cleared at turn end.
Each stack increases Shield gained by 1. Cleared at turn end.
When this arrow triggers an item, apply 1 Burning to a random enemy.
This turn, each item triggers extra times equal to the stack count.
This turn, each time you are attacked by an enemy, draw extra cards next turn.
This turn, whenever an enemy attacks, the attacker gains Burning.
This turn, item reflect effects trigger extra times.
This turn, friendly item attacks target all enemies.
The next item triggers extra times.
Keep your hand at the end of this turn.
This turn, debuff stacks this target gains increase.
At turn end, if this arrow is still in your hand, keep it in your hand.
This turn, enemies gain additional stacks when they receive debuffs.
